title: youtube poop: moar ponies from 2013
description:
I remember putting "moar ponies" as one of my future YTPs on my PooPTuBeNooB channel since around 2011. 

I did work on the YTP since around June 2013 but I stopped working on it because 2013 was around the time my university studies started. 

It was also the time when YTPs started becoming more advanced and I thought I couldnt keep up with it with Windows Movie Maker anymore. I was also too stubborn to give it up.

I tried working on it again in 2015 but I burned out because I thought it's effects were out of date compared to the modern YTPs.

However after I noticed that videos that looked like old videos but are really funny started becoming popular on YouTube (like how retro things are cool now) I decided to finish the unfinished YTPs (like this one) in the same WMM program I always used.

So yeah moral of story is to don't change yourself just to fit in with what you think people want. post sugar applesauce if you read everything here
